name: M249 | 阿兹特克
descriptionEn: A strong open-area LMG, the M249 is the perfect choice for players willing to trade a slow fire rate for increased accuracy and a high ammo capacity. Excavated from Aztec ruins, parts of this M249 have rusted and been covered in moss. Never trust a rope bridge
descriptionZh: 强大的野战轻机枪，对于想要以低射速为代价，换取高精准度和高弹容量的玩家来说，M249 是绝佳选择。 这把M249于阿兹特克遗迹中发掘出来，锈迹斑斑，遍体青苔。 小心吊桥

name: M249 | 岩浆
descriptionEn: A strong open-area LMG, the M249 is the perfect choice for players willing to trade a slow fire rate for increased accuracy and a high ammo capacity. It has copper plated parts that have been masked in a magma pattern and given a red patina using sodium chloride and high heat. Unmasked areas have subsequently been darkened via oxidization using liver of sulfur. A burning rate of fire
descriptionZh: 强大的野战轻机枪，对于想要以低射速为代价，换取高精准度和高弹容量的玩家来说，M249 是绝佳选择。 这把武器的镀铜部分使用岩浆图案进行了覆膜，然后使用氯化钠和高温附上了红色的氧化层。未覆膜的部分通过氧化处理，使用了硫肝将其变暗。 岩浆是火焰的助燃剂

name: M249 | 等高线
descriptionEn: A strong open-area LMG, the M249 is the perfect choice for players willing to trade a slow fire rate for increased accuracy and a high ammo capacity. A sand-colored top layer gives way to darker greens the deeper you go. This is a custom paint job you can feel. How many bullets to get to the center?
descriptionZh: 强大的野战轻机枪，对于想要以低射速为代价，换取高精准度和高弹容量的玩家来说，M249 是绝佳选择。 这是一个诚意满满的定制作品，你完全可以感受得到，看那黄色与深绿的渐变。 让子弹再飞一会儿

name: M249 | 闹市区
descriptionEn: A strong open-area LMG, the M249 is the perfect choice for players willing to trade a slow fire rate for increased accuracy and a high ammo capacity. It has been tagged with blue and pink arrows pointing in every direction. A different kind of spray pattern
descriptionZh: 强大的野战轻机枪，对于想要以低射速为代价，换取高精准度和高弹容量的玩家来说，M249 是绝佳选择。 枪身上绘有蓝色和粉色箭头指向各个方向。 一种不同的喷涂形式

name: M249 | 淹没
descriptionEn: A strong open-area LMG, the M249 is the perfect choice for players willing to trade a slow fire rate for increased accuracy and a high ammo capacity. It has been custom painted using teal-colored desert camouflage and environments as inspiration. \"WE'VE BEEN SET UP! THEY'RE EVERYWHERE!\"
descriptionZh: 强大的野战轻机枪，对于想要以低射速为代价，换取高精准度和高弹容量的玩家来说，M249 是绝佳选择。 这把武器以青色的沙漠伪装和环境为灵感进行了自定义涂装。 “我们被算计了！他们布下了天罗地网！”

name: M249 | 系统锁定
descriptionEn: A strong open-area LMG, the M249 is the perfect choice for players willing to trade a slow fire rate for increased accuracy and a high ammo capacity. It has been custom painted with a sci-fi design. Coverfire never looked so good
descriptionZh: 强大的野战轻机枪，对于想要以低射速为代价，换取高精准度和高弹容量的玩家来说，M249 是绝佳选择。 这把武器使用科幻设计进行了自定义涂装。 火力掩护时相当拉风

name: M249 | 鬼影
descriptionEn: A strong open-area LMG, the M249 is the perfect choice for players willing to trade a slow fire rate for increased accuracy and a high ammo capacity. It has been painted in a sleek and contemporary manner. The Phoenix civil war is about to begin
descriptionZh: 强大的野战轻机枪，对于想要以低射速为代价，换取高精准度和高弹容量的玩家来说，M249 是绝佳选择。 这件武器时尚现代。 凤凰内战一触即发

name: M249 | O.S.I.P.R.
descriptionEn: A strong open-area LMG, the M249 is the perfect choice for players willing to trade a slow fire rate for increased accuracy and a high ammo capacity. This M249 has been custom painted in gunmetal grey and finished with a Combine logo. Overwatch Standard Issue Pulse Rifle
descriptionZh: 强大的野战轻机枪，对于想要以低射速为代价，换取高精准度和高弹容量的玩家来说，M249 是绝佳选择。 这把 M249 采用了青铜和铁灰色的自定义涂装，绘有一个联合军的标志。 标准制式脉冲步枪

name: M249 | 星云十字军
descriptionEn: A strong open-area LMG, the M249 is the perfect choice for players willing to trade a slow fire rate for increased accuracy and a high ammo capacity. It has been custom painted to look like a classic arcade cabinet. You can use it, but you better put up a quarter first
descriptionZh: 强大的野战轻机枪，对于想要以低射速为代价，换取高精准度和高弹容量的玩家来说，M249 是绝佳选择。 这把武器使用了自定义涂装，使其看上去就像是经典的街机游戏机。 你当然可以用了，不过首先得投硬币

name: M249 | 战隼
descriptionEn: A strong open-area LMG, the M249 is the perfect choice for players willing to trade a slow fire rate for increased accuracy and a high ammo capacity. Originally blue with a yellow heat shield, age and use have taken their toll on its appearance. This old bird deserves a rest
descriptionZh: 强大的野战轻机枪，对于想要以低射速为代价，换取高精准度和高弹容量的玩家来说，M249 是绝佳选择。 曾经是通体青碧带有黄色隔热层，岁月在它的表面烙下了沧桑。 倦鸟虽还岂是休

name: M249 | 时频谱
descriptionEn: A strong open-area LMG, the M249 is the perfect choice for players willing to trade a slow fire rate for increased accuracy and a high ammo capacity. It has been custom painted using a green and blue halftone pattern. This one's off the charts
descriptionZh: 强大的野战轻机枪，对于想要以低射速为代价，换取高精准度和高弹容量的玩家来说，M249 是绝佳选择。 这款定制涂装为绿色和蓝色的半色调图案。 这款设计超乎寻常

name: M249 | 暴雪大理石纹
descriptionEn: A strong open-area LMG, the M249 is the perfect choice for players willing to trade a slow fire rate for increased accuracy and a high ammo capacity. It has been painted in a marbleized pattern.
descriptionZh: 强大的野战轻机枪，对于想要以低射速为代价，换取高精准度和高弹容量的玩家来说，M249 是绝佳选择。 这把武器被涂上了大理石纹图案。

name: M249 | 丛林 DDPAT
descriptionEn: A strong open-area LMG, the M249 is the perfect choice for players willing to trade a slow fire rate for increased accuracy and a high ammo capacity. It has been painted using a Digital Disruptive Pattern (DDPAT) hydrographic. By the time you're close enough to notice the pixels it's already too late
descriptionZh: 强大的野战轻机枪，对于想要以低射速为代价，换取高精准度和高弹容量的玩家来说，M249 是绝佳选择。 这把武器使用数字迷彩（DDPAT）图案的花纹进行了涂装。 当你能注意到像素图案的时候，已经为时已晚了

name: M249 | 海滨预测者
descriptionEn: A strong open-area LMG, the M249 is the perfect choice for players willing to trade a slow fire rate for increased accuracy and a high ammo capacity. It has been painted with a hydrographic in a zodiac motif. Who knows what the future holds
descriptionZh: 强大的野战轻机枪，对于想要以低射速为代价，换取高精准度和高弹容量的玩家来说，M249 是绝佳选择。 这把武器使用十二宫的花纹进行了涂装。 没有人能够把握未来

name: M249 | 冻雨
descriptionEn: A strong open-area LMG, the M249 is the perfect choice for players willing to trade a slow fire rate for increased accuracy and a high ammo capacity. An angular grayscale pattern has been applied. Rich interiors suited for rough exteriors
descriptionZh: 强大的野战轻机枪，对于想要以低射速为代价，换取高精准度和高弹容量的玩家来说，M249 是绝佳选择。 采用了棱角分明的灰度纹理。 粗犷外表，适配奢华内构

name: M249 | 鼠尾草迷彩
descriptionEn: A strong open-area LMG, the M249 is the perfect choice for players willing to trade a slow fire rate for increased accuracy and a high ammo capacity. A green and grey hydrographic pattern has been applied. \"We weren't sure if we were the ambushers... or the ambushees\"
descriptionZh: 强大的野战轻机枪，对于想要以低射速为代价，换取高精准度和高弹容量的玩家来说，M249 是绝佳选择。 枪身采用了灰绿水转印伪装涂装。 “我们分不清自己到底是伏击者……还是猎物”

name: M249 | 博客积木
descriptionEn: A strong open-area LMG, the M249 is the perfect choice for players willing to trade a slow fire rate for increased accuracy and a high ammo capacity. It has been custom painted with a purple graphic geometric design. Stack 'em
descriptionZh: 强大的野战轻机枪，对于想要以低射速为代价，换取高精准度和高弹容量的玩家来说，M249 是绝佳选择。 它定制涂装了紫色图形化几何图案。 叠吧叠吧

name: M249 | 催眠术
descriptionEn: A strong open-area LMG, the M249 is the perfect choice for players willing to trade a slow fire rate for increased accuracy and a high ammo capacity. It has been custom painted with an eye catching black and blue hypnotic design. \"Focus on the sound of my voice\"
descriptionZh: 强大的野战轻机枪，对于想要以低射速为代价，换取高精准度和高弹容量的玩家来说，M249 是绝佳选择。 这款定制涂装为引人注目的黑蓝色设计，看起来很催眠。 “专注听我的声音”
